name: opencli-bridge
description: Bridges @jackwener/opencli — turn any website into a deterministic CLI. Ships with 100+ pre-built site adapters (HN, Reddit, X, Bilibili, Wikipedia, PyPI, Steam, etc.) plus the chrome.debugger extension auto-loaded into the agent's own Chrome. The LLM picks the cheapest tool: zero-token deterministic adapter when one exists, live-browse + adapter-author when not. Per-OC-profile state isolation via HOME-shim.
author: OpenComputer
